description: Composition Green tunic top made of 100% cotton, with three-quarter sleeves, round ribbed neck with a printed inner back neck panel, drop waist with a braided belt, pockets at the drop waist and has an embroidered branding below the left pocket Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash warm using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shade Warm iron/do not iron on print or embroidery Perfect for this winter, this tunic top from lee is designed for those who never comrpomise on comfort and style. The three-quarter sleeves sit snug on your arms keeping the chill at bay, while the drop waist hides all that unwanted belly and gives you that to-die-for look. Team it with jeans and sandals for that chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
